description: Verify that data import/export, HL7/FHIR transformations, and integrity checks are functioning correctly.
objective: To ensure that data is accurately imported, transformed, and stored without any inconsistencies or errors.
prerequisites: Data source is available and accessible
test_steps: Step 1: Import sample data from a known good source
Step 2: Verify that the imported data is accurate and complete
Step 3: Perform HL7/FHIR transformations on the imported data
Step 4: Verify that the transformed data is correct and consistent with the original data
expected_result: Data import/export, HL7/FHIR transformations, and integrity checks are functioning correctly without any errors or inconsistencies.
acceptance_criteria: Data is accurately imported and transformed without any errors or inconsistencies
Integrity checks are functioning correctly and detecting all potential issues
